project.name: Multi-Catalog Conflict Fixture
project.description: Jawata-owned fixture for Sprint 22a R.1 (Stage 14) — the multi-catalog conflict seam. Tangled.knot is a single method that, under a family=fowler sweep with threshold=3, is flagged by TWO detectors at ONE location: long_method (body over the LOC cutoff) and long_parameter_list (over the parameter cutoff). The conflict seam must surface both detectors + their families as arbitration INPUTS and decide nothing.
